title: eitenia praxeloides
intro: Eitenia praxeloides is a plant species, also known as the "African Violet" but more specifically a member of the Asteraceae family. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eitenia praxeloides include treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from pain and inflammation. Eitenia praxeloides can be prepared as a tea or infusion, or used in combination with other herbs to create a medicinal tincture or ointment.
